overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a morning walk along a futuristic waterfront dock. The player descends stairs onto a wooden pier, passes through a group of NPCs performing yoga exercises, and continues along the promenade with cyberpunk architecture, palm trees, and sleek boats visible.

agents.ego_description: walking down wooden stairs onto the dock while approaching a group of people exercising in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on wooden stairs descending toward a waterfront dock. Futuristic boats are moored on both sides, and palm trees line the distant waterfront. The camera approaches a group of people exercising on the dock ahead.

events.description: passes through the center of the exercise group performing yoga poses

agents.ego_description: walking through a group of NPCs performing yoga and stretching exercises on the wooden dock

entered.detail: metal railing along the edge of the dock overlooking the water

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through an open dock area where several NPCs are performing yoga and stretching exercises in the morning sun. The group includes women in athletic wear and a tattooed man, positioned across the wooden planks. Modern buildings with neon signage become visible on the left as the camera passes through.

segments.scene_description: Having passed the exercise group, the camera continues along the wooden dock toward a concrete ramp structure. The cyberpunk cityscape with neon signs and glass towers dominates the left side, while futuristic boats remain moored along the right. The area ahead opens toward an ascending ramp.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper waterfront walkway with concrete ramp

turns right along the upper level overlooking the docked boats below

agents.ego_description: walking up a concrete ramp to an upper level walkway with views of the boats docked below

notable_agents.action: person standing near the water's edge on the lower dock level

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a concrete ramp from the wooden dock to an upper concrete walkway. The perspective shifts to overlook the boats moored below. A concrete retaining wall runs along the left side while metal railings provide safety on the right overlooking the water. The path continues along the upper waterfront level.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper waterfront promenade with beached boats

events.description: passes a distinctive blue futuristic boat beached or docked at the lower level

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper waterfront path observing the docked boats and city architecture in the morning light

entered.detail: distinctive bright blue futuristic boat with open deck visible below the walkway
tall vertical structure with solar panels or signage near the water's edge
staircase leading up to higher levels on the left side

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the upper concrete waterfront promenade. A distinctive blue futuristic boat is visible beached or docked at the lower level, alongside other moored vessels. The concrete retaining wall continues on the left with palm trees visible above, while the open water and docked boats occupy the right side. The morning sun creates a warm glow over the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a descending wooden pier up onto a sunlit concrete promenade overlooking a futuristic harbor. It begins on wooden stairs descending toward a dock lined with moored boats and distant palm trees, moving steadily toward a group of people performing yoga and stretching in the morning sun. As the camera passes through the exercise group, the scene opens up to reveal a cyberpunk cityscape of neon signs and glass towers on the left before the path leads toward a concrete ramp. The perspective then shifts upward as the camera ascends the ramp from the wooden planks to an elevated walkway, providing a high-angle view of the vessels below. Finally, the movement continues along the upper promenade past a distinctive blue futuristic boat, with the morning sun casting a warm glow over the retaining walls and the sprawling urban waterfront.
